PETITION EXPUNGE MECAHNICS LIEN FILED BY PETITIONER IZABAL, ROBERTO TRUSTEE OF THE ROBERTO IZABAL TRUST AS TO RESPONDENT WEST COAST INSULATION, INC. DEHERRERA, LOU DBA ECHO LANDSCAPE

ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO EXPUNGE MECHANIC'S LIENS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 3154

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO EXPUNGE MECHANIC'S LIENS PER CC 3154, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER IZABAL, ROBERTO TRUSTEE OF THE ROBERTO IZABAL TRUST HEARING SET FOR APR-29-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY RESPONDENT DEHERRERA, LOU DBA ECHO LANDSCAPE
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-05-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ROBERTO IZABAL'S PETITION TO EXPUNGE MECHANIC'S LIENS PER C C 3154 IS CONTINUED TO MAY 5, 2010 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR # 5797 301/PHA

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER ROBERTO IZABAL, TRUSTEE OF THE ROBERTO IZABAL TRUST'S PETITION TO EXPUNGE MECHANIC'S LIENS PER CC 3154 IS GRANTED AS TO BOTH WEST COAST INSULATION AND ECHO LANDSCAPE. ATTORNEY'S FEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $1750 AND COST IN THE AMOUNT OF $445 IS ALSO GRANTED ONLY AS AGAINST WEST COAST INSULATION INCORPORATED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR # 4780 301/PHA
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: ON PETITION TO EXPUNGE MECHANIC'S LIENS, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
